subject: Can't access SAP — need help urgently
description:
Hi IT Support,

I've been trying to log into SAP all morning but keep getting an error. I really need this fixed because I have month-end reports due today and my manager is already asking where the numbers are. I tried restarting my computer but that didn't help. Then I tried clearing my browser cache and cookies but that didn't work either. I also tried using a different browser (Chrome instead of Edge) but same error. My colleague sitting next to me can access SAP fine so it's definitely something with my account or machine.

Let me give you some more context — I was able to access SAP yesterday afternoon around 3pm without any issues. I made some changes to a few reports and saved them. Then this morning when I came in around 7:30am, I tried to log in and it just wouldn't work. The error message says something about 'authentication failed' but I'm using the same password I've always used. I haven't changed it recently and it's not expired as far as I know.

I should mention that we had a power outage in our building last night — the facilities team sent an email about it. Not sure if that's related but I thought I'd mention it. Also, I noticed that my Outlook is working fine, Teams is working fine, and I can access SharePoint without any problems. It's literally just SAP that won't let me in.

I tried calling the help desk earlier but was on hold for 20 minutes and had to hang up because of a meeting. I'm really frustrated because this is costing me hours of productivity. I've been with the company for 8 years and this has never happened before. My employee ID is 4829 and my manager is David Chen in the Finance department.

Can someone please look into this ASAP? I need SAP access restored before 2pm today at the latest because that's when my manager wants the month-end reconciliation numbers. If I can't get this done today, it affects the entire finance team's workflow and potentially delays the quarterly filing.

Also, while I have your attention, is there any way to get the SAP interface to display in a larger font? I've been having trouble reading the small text on my 24-inch monitor. This isn't urgent but if someone could help with that too, I'd appreciate it.

One more thing — I noticed that the SAP application seems to have been updated recently. The login screen looks different from what I remember. Did IT push an update? Maybe that's what's causing the issue? I remember reading an email about planned maintenance but I thought that was for SharePoint, not SAP.

Here's exactly what happens when I try to log in:
1. I open Chrome and go to sap.contoso.com
2. The login page loads (new interface with Contoso branding)
3. I enter my username (jthompson@contoso.com) and password
4. I click 'Sign In'
5. The page shows a spinning wheel for about 10 seconds
6. Then I get a red banner that says 'Authentication Failed — Please contact your administrator'
7. If I click 'Try Again' it just does the same thing

I've tried this about 15 times now. Same result every time. Please help!

Thanks,
Jennifer Thompson
Senior Financial Analyst
Finance Department, 5th Floor
Ext: 4829
jennifer.thompson@contoso.com

subject: Network issue
description:
Hi Team,

I'm having trouble with the VPN connection from our London office. It keeps disconnecting every 10-15 minutes and I have to manually reconnect each time.

I've attached a log file from the VPN client.

This is affecting my ability to access the internal SharePoint sites and SAP system.

subject: 🚨🚨🚨 HELP!!! 💻🔥 Computer is SO SLOW 😤😤😤 Can't work!!! 🆘🆘🆘
description:
😡😡😡 OMG my computer is SOOOOO slow today!!! 🐌🐌🐌

I can't even open Excel without waiting like 5️⃣ minutes!!! ⏰⏰
This is UNACCEPTABLE!!! 🚫🚫

I have a 📊 presentation due in 2️⃣ hours and I can't even open my files!!! 📁😱

Please fix this ASAP!!! 🏃‍♂️💨

- Laptop model: ThinkPad T14 💻
- OS: Windows 11 🪟
- Apps affected: Excel 📊, PowerPoint 📽️, Outlook 📧

This has been happening since Monday 📅 and it's getting worse every day!!! ⬇️📉

🙏🙏🙏 PLEASE HELP!!! 🆘🆘🆘

Thanks!! 🙏✨💯🎉

subject: Issue with account
description:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: IT Helpdesk <helpdesk@contoso.com>
Date: Mon, Mar 16, 2026 at 3:45 PM
Subject: Re: Issue with account
To: David Park <david.park@contoso.com>

Hi David,

We've reset your password. Please try logging in again.

Best,
IT Helpdesk

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: David Park <david.park@contoso.com>
Date: Mon, Mar 16, 2026 at 2:30 PM
Subject: Re: Issue with account
To: IT Helpdesk <helpdesk@contoso.com>

Thanks but I already tried that. The password reset worked but now I'm getting a different error — it says 'Your account has been disabled. Contact your administrator.' I think something happened during the directory sync last night because my manager mentioned other people in our team are having similar issues.

---------- Original message ---------
From: David Park <david.park@contoso.com>
Date: Mon, Mar 16, 2026 at 10:15 AM
Subject: Issue with account
To: IT Helpdesk <helpdesk@contoso.com>

Hi, I can't log into my workstation this morning. Getting 'account locked out' error. Tried the self-service password reset portal but it said my account doesn't qualify. I'm in the Singapore office if that matters.

Thanks,
David Park
Compliance Team

subject: Mój komputer nie działa — pilne! / My computer not working — urgent!
description:

It restarts and same error again. Próbuję pracować ale nie mogę.

Proszę o pomoc! / Please help!

Łukasz Kowalski
Dział Finansów / Finance Department
Biuro w Londynie / London Office

subject: المساعدة في مشكلة VPN — Singapore office connectivity
description:
السلام عليكم

I'm having VPN issues from the Singapore office. The connection drops every few minutes. 

我也试过用中文描述这个问题 — VPN 连接在新加坡办公室断断续续的。

Specifically:
- VPN client: GlobalProtect v5.2
- OS: macOS Sonoma 14.3
- Connected to Singapore office WiFi (Contoso-SG)
- Error in client: 'Gateway timed out'
- Started Monday morning after the weekend maintenance

Merci d'avance pour votre aide.

ありがとうございます。

Best regards,
Yusuf Ibrahim
Singapore Office
